title: 10Pcs Tea Spoons Mini Dessert Spoons Stainless Steel Heart Shape Coffee Spoons for Espresso Hot Chocolate Drinks Demitasse Ice Cream(5.6inch)
features: Material: Made of extra-fine food grade stainless steel and sturdier than other stainless steel, with Mirrored Finishes makes these flatware sets always keep shining
Package Contents: Includes 10 pieces of heart-shaped coffee spoons,you can also share with your friends
Design: With ergonomics handle they feel good in your hand. Simple but elegant design makes it easy to match your existing cutlery
Wide Application: Can be used as dessert, soup, ice cream, sundaes, ice tea spoons, coffee mixing spoons, cocktail stirring spoons. suitable for home, bar, party, dessert store, restaurant use

Warm Tip: Do not leave your spoons sitting in water, as soaking can permanently damage the metal, and please make sure your spoons is completely dry before you store it. Your daily behavior during use of your spoons keeps each piece bright and shiny
